case_title: KEYLAN DUNN VS. ALEXANDRIA JANINE JONES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT ORDERS THIS CASE OFF-CALENDAR. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE THE AMOUNT THAT DEFENDANT MIGHT BE REQUIRED TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF, BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S PAYMENTS TO THE CREDITOR ARE ON-GOING, AND NOT YET COMPLETE. WHEN THE FULL EXTENT OF HIS PAYMENT HAS BEEN DETERMINED PLAINTIFF MAY RESET THIS CASE FOR HEARING ON THE MERITS. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
